comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.21/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Do you want to target this for RHEL 8.4.0.2?  I think we need to update the man pages with the change to pull before hand, and I'm leery about making this change just before the deadline.  I'm fine with the Main branch though.  Thoughts?
Yes, I intended it for 8.4.0.2 so that Podman and Buildah share the same behavior and have the same version of c/common.
